name: co-deck
description: Lecture and presentation material production variant — 11-stage AI workflow from research to print-ready PDF. Includes 11 agents (1 PM orchestrator + 10 specialists) covering research, source verification, content, design, image curation, diagram/chart generation, HTML build (5 themes), layout measurement, and PDF export.

agent_manifest.notes: optional[]: omit agent entirely from workflow. skippable[]: run but --skip-verify flag makes failure non-blocking. retry_policy: on trust_score < trust_score_thresholds.pass (90%) or any Core Message source failure, return to research (max 2 retries before PM escalation). image-curator: skip if all slides use image_role: none or images are pre-supplied. diagram-specialist: skip if no visual_spec fields exist in slide_deck.md. image-curator and diagram-specialist run in parallel at Stage 3.5.

theme_manifest.notes: Shared style/color pool (ADR-0045 Decision B): each style is styles/<name>/{style.css, pdf_color_spec.json}; styles live in the shared styles/ pool, NOT nested under themes. CSS Load Order (injected by html-build): styles/base.css -> themes/_shared/ppt-engine.css (PPT themes only) -> themes/<theme>/theme.css -> styles/<style>/style.css. Each theme declares css_base + css_theme + optionally css_ppt_engine in theme.json. Region-based pdf_layout_spec.json (v1.2.0): regions.* = {x_pct,y_pct,w_pct,h_pct,fit?} or null; slide_types[type].regions declares which regions each slide type uses; themes/_shared/layout_base.json is Layer 0 (region skeleton all-null + 16:9 page + print defaults). gen-slides-pdf.ts (v1.7.0) is theme-agnostic — dispatch by declared slide_types, not theme name; 4-layer deepMerge (shared -> theme -> style -> project); required regions resolving to null throw (no silent fallback). PPT-transformed themes (outline/pitch-enhanced/zen/vertical v3.0.0) share _shared/ppt-engine.css + _shared/ppt-engine.js: thumbnails, transitions (fade/push/zoom), presenter timer, speaker notes. Original pitch v1.0.0 preserved unchanged. Default theme is pitch-enhanced. All PPT themes compatible with all 5 styles (visual-heavy: partial). preview/themes-manifest.js is AUTO-GENERATED by generate-themes-manifest.ts — regenerate after adding/removing themes or styles. premium-dark is the DEFAULT style (2026-06-22): dark navy + gold accent + MaruBuri/Noto Serif KR + soft gold title glow; compatible with all themes; derived from the kyobo_ax_2026 executive deck. classic/pdf_color_spec.json was corrected to a LIGHT palette (previously held a dark palette — drift fix).

lecture_profile.notes: Master template copied to presentations/<project>/lecture-profile.md on new-project creation. Agents load the local project profile at stage start.
